title: Polling Preparations Intensify Across Erode
summary: Authorities across Erode district have significantly intensified preparations for the upcoming polling day, ensuring that all logistical, administrative, and security arrangements are fully in place. Polling booths across urban and rural areas have been equipped with Electronic Voting Machines (EVMs), VVPAT units, drinking water facilities, shaded waiting areas, and accessibility features for elderly and differently-abled voters. Officials conducted repeated inspections and coordination meetings with various departments. Special attention has been given to interior regions to ensure smooth and inclusive voting.

title: Strict Monitoring on Cash Movement
summary: Election flying squads and surveillance teams intensified checks across highways, market areas, and district borders to curb illegal cash distribution. Several vehicles were intercepted and inspected, and unaccounted money was seized. Authorities warned that strict legal action will be taken against those violating election norms.

title: Campaigning Ends with Strong Public Engagement
summary: Political parties concluded their campaigns with rallies and public meetings across Erode district. Leaders highlighted issues related to agriculture, textile industries, employment, and infrastructure development while making final appeals to voters.

title: Multi-Layer Security Deployed
summary: Security arrangements have been strengthened with deployment of central forces and additional police personnel. Checkposts, patrol units, and surveillance systems are actively monitoring sensitive areas.

title: Transport Plans Finalized for Polling
summary: Authorities arranged special buses and vehicles to transport polling staff and election materials across the district, including remote villages.

title: Healthcare Teams Deployed
summary: Medical teams and ambulances have been stationed near polling booths to handle emergencies and heat-related illnesses.

title: Heatwave Conditions Continue
summary: High temperatures continue to affect daily life in Erode, prompting authorities to advise precautions.

summary: Awareness campaigns were conducted to encourage higher voter turnout.
